description: Create a local BLAST database from the unannotated E. coli genome at ~/UGENE_Data/blast/ecoli_genome.fasta. Perform a BLASTN search using the 16S rRNA query sequence at ~/UGENE_Data/blast/16s_query.fasta (E-value threshold <= 1e-10) to identify all genomic copies. Save the identified hits as annotations on the genome sequence. Export the annotated genome as a GenBank file to ~/UGENE_Data/blast/results/ecoli_16s_annotated.gb and create a plain text summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/blast/results/16s_blast_report.txt containing the total number of 16S rRNA copies found and their start/end coordinates.
